name: Pollo Alla Diavola (Chicken Devil's Style)
recipeIngredient: 3 Dried red chilies, stemmed and seeded
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a small pan over medium heat on a stove burner.
2. Add the chili pods and sauté them until they are deep, dark brown. Turn off the heat and let the oil cool before discarding the chilies (alternatively, add Tabasco sauce to make it hot without cooking).
3. Crack the leg and wing joints of the chicken halves loose and place them skin side up on a board or clean counter.
4. Pound the chicken halves with a meat mallet to flatten them.
5. Add the juice of 1 lemon and 3-4 twists of pepper to the seasoned olive oil.
6. Place the chicken halves in a large bowl, pour the seasoned olive oil over them, and turn the pieces to coat well.
7. Let the chicken stand for 1-2 hours, turning occasionally.
8. Start your charcoal grill and preheat until it is hot with coals.
9. Place the marinated chicken halves on the grill, skin side down.
10. Sprinkle salt and a little more pepper over the chicken.
11. Grill the chicken thoroughly, turning and basting with the remaining marinade.
12. The chicken is done when it is tender and has a dark brown crust (some spots may be charred).
13. Serve hot with lemon wedges.
